notes.subject: Only 30 Cents more for Large!
notes.body: Large Soda is now only 30 cents more than Regular (was 10 cents). Drill every cashier and shift lead on the new language — the old '10 cents more' line is dead. Standing: FGU 0% overdue (5/15 deadline passed — confirm completion), Orientation Checklist with all new hires.

notes.subject: Re: G.O.A.T Trophy
notes.body: Elesha and team Etown brought 2 100's and 1 92% — play the video with the team. Also live: review the Recent KPI miss chart and share with the team at pre-shift; swag contest — first two shift leads to text the correct answer win Five Guys swag (812-267-8669, no GMs answer).

notes.subject: Labor Not Posted — 05/24
notes.body: KY-2065 Post Period — Labor Not Posted for 05/24, plus open L-Rev 05/24. Post labor in CrunchTime today.

notes.subject: 5/16 Dinner shop 75%
notes.body: 5/16 Dinner shop scored 75% — on shift Francisco, Jada, Jeremiah, Madison. Store month avg 92.5% (4 shops), YTD 83.8% (29 shops). Coaching focus: service + order accuracy on the dinner rush. Action plan owed.

notes.subject: Order Posted CIN01984
notes.body: PFGC order posted for Five Guys 2065. Note: Memorial Day Monday 5/25 — no delivery; Mon+Tue deliveries combine Tuesday 5/26.
